sources.citation: MDN Web Docs. HTML5 Audio and Video.

learning_objectives: L1: Identify table structural elements: table, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr, th, td.
L1: State the purpose of colspan, rowspan, scope, and caption.
L1: Name HTML5 media elements and their key attributes.
L2: Explain how ARIA roles and labels improve accessibility.
L2: Describe how data-* enables custom data storage in HTML.
L2: Explain relative, absolute, and root-relative URL paths.
L3: Build an accessible responsive table with merged cells, caption, and column headers.
L3: Mark up a form with correct ARIA labels and error-message associations.

concepts.title: Table Structure
concepts.explanation: <table>, <caption> (required for accessibility), <thead>/<tbody>/<tfoot>, <tr>, <th scope='col|row'>, <td>, colspan/rowspan. Never use tables for layout.

concepts.title: Audio, Video, iframe
concepts.explanation: <video controls width='640'>. <source>: multiple formats. <track kind='subtitles'>: WCAG AA required. <iframe title='...'>: title mandatory.
concepts.worked_example: <video controls width='640' poster='thumb.jpg'><source src='demo.mp4' type='video/mp4'><track kind='subtitles' src='demo.vtt' srclang='en'></video>

concepts.title: URL Path Types
concepts.explanation: Absolute: full URL. Root-relative: starts with / — portable. Relative: from current file. Use relative for local assets; absolute for external.

concepts.title: ARIA and Form Accessibility
concepts.explanation: aria-label, aria-labelledby, aria-describedby, aria-required, aria-invalid, role='alert'. <fieldset>+<legend> for groups.
concepts.worked_example: 4–20 chars.Username taken.

concepts.title: data-* Custom Attributes
concepts.explanation: Store custom data in HTML for JS. Syntax: data-anything='value'. Access: element.dataset.anything. Never store sensitive data.

concepts.title: Head Meta Tags
concepts.explanation: <meta name='description'>: 150–160 chars. <meta name='viewport'>: essential for mobile. Open Graph: og:title/description/image. <link rel='canonical'>: prevents duplicate content.
